payload.input_str: {'sql': 'SELECT c.Maker, MAX(CAST(cd.Horsepower AS INTEGER)) AS MaxHorsepower FROM car_makers c JOIN car_names cn ON c.Id = cn.MakeId JOIN cars_data cd ON cn.Id = cd.MakeId WHERE cd.Cylinders = 3 GROUP BY c.Maker;'}
